song.title: Make Me a Believer
song.lyrics: [V1] .C G F G Lord, keep my heart Open and soft for You; .C G F G Lord, draw my eyes to See nothing else but You;|| . C G Whatever may happen . Am G I know You want to gain my heart, . C G Though I may not understand . Am G Just keep dispensing into my every part|| . F G Am F Make me a be_liever by looking at You. . C G F C (G) Standing on Your Word, faithful and true.
